violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to make the back door tight fitting. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The 1 door reach-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by containers. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
The hot water tank in the basement was not operational, business has a service call in. Establishment to provide proof of repair to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
